title: Cost Indicators & Query Patterns
description: Cost indicators, clause counts, and query pattern analysis.

targets.query: cluster_name:(${cluster:lucene}) AND identity.applicative_provider:(${application:lucene}) AND request.target:(${target:lucene}) AND request.operation:(${operation:lucene}) AND identity.username:(${username:lucene}) AND stress.cost_indicator_names:(${cost_indicator:lucene}) AND identity.client_host:(${client_host:lucene}) AND request.template:(${template:lucene}) AND stress.cost_indicator_count:[1 TO *]
